reviews.review_description: It's actually quite fun for practicing driving. However, sometimes I get sent back to the checkpoint even though I didn't hit anything. I don't know what triggers it, but the constant automatic resets make it really hard to play.

I’m honestly in love with this game! The VR parking feels so real — the mirrors, the back camera, the sensors… it’s like driving a real car. Arcade Mode is super addictive, and for this price, it’s such a steal. If you love driving or parking games, you’ll fall for this one instantly!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your amazing feedback! 🌟 We’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the realistic VR parking and getting hooked on Arcade Mode. Our goal is to make driving and parking feel as real and fun as possible, so it’s awesome to know it’s hitting the mark for you. Stay tuned — we’ve got even more exciting updates and features coming soon! 🚗💨
